findings.summary: `WXTacticalUI` is still spelled with backslash-newline line splicing in FBattleScreen declarations/includes/construction.
findings.impact: Non-blocking maintainability/auditability issue only; local build succeeded.

findings.summary: Subtask 4 documenter artifacts still reference missing tester artifact filenames.
findings.impact: Minor artifact-trail mismatch only; did not prevent feature-level review.

notes: Reviewed against the original Milestone 7 plan, with Subtask 3 assessed as part of the merged final result rather than the temporary intermediate failing test state.
FBattleScreen now owns FTacticalGame and WXTacticalUI, delegates tactical state/report/combat paths to FTacticalGame, and preserves the wx-shell redraw and guarded close responsibilities.
Local validation on this review worktree passed: `make -j4` and `cd tests/tactical && make clean && make -j2 && ./TacticalTests` (`OK (44 tests)`).
No material feature-level gaps or follow-up planning needs were identified.
